strategies.name: trendy
strategies.label: Trendy / current-feel words
strategies.description: Include or start with a trendy word if relevant (vibe, flow, auto, sync, drop, ship, ai, x)

strategies.name: dev-technical
strategies.label: Developer / technical names
strategies.description: Developer or technical-feel names (deploy, ship, stack, prod, guard, lint, build, sentry, runtime)

strategies.name: benefit-driven
strategies.label: Benefit-driven names
strategies.description: Names communicating an end-user benefit directly (safe, fast, ready, secure, simple, smart, easy)

strategies.name: metaphor
strategies.label: Metaphor / image names
strategies.description: Evocative single-word or two-word names drawn from images and metaphors (flight, radar, shield, sentinel, lighthouse, compass, beacon, anchor)

strategies.name: abstract-brandable
strategies.label: Abstract / brandable invented words
strategies.description: Short brandable invented words (5-10 chars), pronounceable, no obvious meaning — Stripe / Plaid / Notion category
